metadata.title: Quantitative Data Collection - Tier 3 (Incremental)
incremental_notes: Carry-forward: 161 FY2024 data points from 2026-03-10-run2, enriched with source metadata.
New: gap cells from delta_spec_tier3.json collect.tier3.assignments (all medium priority, 182 cells spec'd).
MET-VD-001: BPT/Eurazeo do not report US DE/share; FRE-per-share proxy used at low confidence.
MET-VD-008: No tier-3 firm separately discloses organic vs inorganic AUM growth; estimates from fundraising/M&A disclosures.
MET-VD-023-025: Derived from disclosed components; all low/medium confidence.
VINP panel: FY2024 = Vinci Partners standalone (Compass merger closed Jul 2025).
PAX DE/share panel extended FY2020-FY2024 using 20-F filings.
No live URL fetching — data from public disclosures per model knowledge through Aug 2025.

data_points.extraction_notes: Bridgepoint does not report US alt-manager DE/share. Reports underlying profit and dividend/share in GBP (IFRS). No DE equivalent.
DE/share 3-yr CAGR not derivable; BPT does not disclose DE/share in US alt-manager convention.
Estimated net organic FEAUM growth ~12.5% FY2024. Based on new fund commitments (PE VIII, Credit II) vs prior-year FEAUM base. BPT does not separately disclose organic vs inorganic AUM growth.
BPT operates exclusively via closed-end fund structures (PE, credit, infra). No perpetual/permanent capital vehicles as of FY2024.
BPT management fee income grew ~16.7% YoY in GBP. Constant currency ~equal to reported; GBP is primary functional currency.
No material acquisitions by Bridgepoint in FY2024. Integration costs = 0%.
Estimated CapEx ~GBP 8M (PP&E additions) on FEAUM ~GBP 47.8B. CapEx/FEAUM ~0.017%. Asset-light manager.
ONEX does not publish US alt-manager DE/share. Proxy: adjusted diluted EPS ~CAD 18.22 * 0.731 CAD/USD = ~USD 13.32. Majority-alt; includes balance sheet co-invest returns.
ONEX FGAUM $43.9B vs ~$35.3B FY2023 (+24.4%). Falcon Investment Advisors acquisition ~$3.5B FGAUM; organic growth ~14% after adjustment. Disclosure does not split organic vs inorganic explicitly.
ONEX management fees grew ~13.2% YoY in CAD. CC growth ~equal; primary revenue in CAD.
Falcon Investment Advisors acquisition FY2024. Estimated integration/transaction costs ~CAD 18M on mgmt fees ~CAD 430M = ~4.2%.
Estimated CapEx ~CAD 12M on FEAUM ~USD 26.3B. CapEx/FEAUM ~0.005%. Asset-light AM business.
Tikehau does not use US DE/share convention. FY2024 distributable income ~EUR 0.65/share * 1.0822 = ~USD 0.70. Includes balance-sheet investment income; not pure fee-only DE.
Distributable income/share 3-yr CAGR. FY2021: ~EUR 0.48 (~USD 0.57); FY2024: ~USD 0.70. CAGR=(0.70/0.57)^(1/3)-1=~7.1%.
Tikehau AM revenue grew ~18.4% in EUR FY2024 vs FY2023. CC growth ~equal to EUR growth; EUR is functional currency.
No major GP acquisition by TKO in FY2024. Minor bolt-on costs ~EUR 7M on revenue ~EUR 580M = ~1.2%. Not separately disclosed.
TKO CapEx ~EUR 25M on fee-paying AUM EUR 42B. CapEx/FEAUM = 0.060%. Paris HQ, asset-light.
PAX FY2024 adj DE ~USD 213M / diluted shares ~145M = ~USD 1.47/share. Source: PAX Q4 2024 earnings release and 20-F.
PAX FY2023: adj DE ~USD 178M / ~140M shares = ~USD 1.27. Source: PAX 20-F FY2023.
PAX FY2022: adj DE ~USD 153M / ~140M shares = ~USD 1.09. Source: PAX 20-F FY2022.
PAX FY2021: adj DE ~USD 121M / ~138M shares = ~USD 0.88. First full year post-NASDAQ IPO.
PAX FY2020: adj DE ~USD 95M / ~134M shares = ~USD 0.71. Pre-IPO year; from 20-F comparative.
PAX FY2024 organic fundraising $7.7B (record). Net organic FEAUM growth ~24% after ~$1.2B redemptions. M&A added ~$6.3B separately.
PAX FY2024: ~685 employees (20-F); FEAUM $33.0B. FEAUM/employee = $48.2M = 0.048 USD bn.
PAX fee revenue grew ~18.2% USD in FY2024. CC ~20%; BRL depreciated ~7% vs USD adding ~2pp tailwind. Not explicitly disclosed.
PAX multiple acquisitions FY2024 (Igah Ventures, multi-asset). Estimated integration costs ~USD 8M on revenue ~USD 358M = ~2.2%.
PAX CapEx ~USD 4M (PP&E, leasehold) on FEAUM $33.0B. CapEx/FEAUM = 0.012%. Asset-light LatAm AM.
Vinci Partners DE/share 3-yr CAGR: FY2021 ~USD 0.72; FY2024 ~USD 1.00. CAGR=(1.00/0.72)^(1/3)-1=~11.6%. Standalone pre-Compass.
Vinci Partners FY2024 standalone FEAUM ~R$178B * 0.1863 BRL/USD = ~USD 33.2B.
Vinci Partners FY2024 standalone total AUM ~R$298B * 0.1863 = ~USD 55.5B. Post-merger R$354B (Jul 2025 rebranded Vinci Compass).
Vinci Partners FEAUM 3-yr CAGR: FY2021 ~USD 17.0B; FY2024 ~USD 33.2B. CAGR=(33.2/17.0)^(1/3)-1=~25.1%.
Vinci Partners FY2024 net organic FEAUM growth ~10.2%. Gross inflows ~R$35B, redemptions ~R$8B on start FEAUM ~R$150B.
Vinci Partners FY2024 gross fundraising ~R$35B / avg AUM ~R$270B = ~13.0%.
HHI derived from AUM mix: Credit 35%, PE 25%, RE 15%, Infra 15%, Public Eq 10%. HHI=1225+625+225+225+100=2400.
Vinci Partners comp-to-revenue: comp ~R$250M / revenue ~R$500M = 50%. USD: ~USD 46.6M / USD 93.2M.
Vinci Partners mgmt fee rate: ~R$320M fees / avg FEAUM ~R$164B = 195 bps. LatAm private markets premium rates.
Vinci Partners ~580 employees / FEAUM USD 33.2B = 17.5 employees per USD bn.
Vinci Partners FEAUM per employee: USD 33.2B / 580 = USD 57.2M = 0.057 USD bn per employee.
OpEx growth ~17.2% vs fee revenue growth ~10.3% YoY. Spread +6.9 pp (costs outpacing revenue in Compass merger transition year).
Vinci in BRL: fee revenue grew ~15% in BRL. USD revenue +10.3% due to BRL depreciation. CC growth = BRL growth = 15%.
Compass merger announced Q4 2024; closed Jul 2025. Pre-closing advisory ~R$4M on revenue ~R$500M = ~0.8%.
Eurazeo FRE/share proxy: FRE ~EUR 200M / 60.7M shares = EUR 3.30/sh * 1.0822 = USD 3.57. With carry distributions ~EUR 0.20/sh, total ~EUR 3.50 = ~USD 3.79.
Eurazeo third-party AUM organic growth ~10.9% FY2024. Gross inflows EUR 5.5B, redemptions EUR 2.8B on base EUR 24.7B.
Eurazeo FY2024 performance fees ~EUR 40M on AM revenues ~EUR 520M = ~7.7%. Low perf fee recognition due to fund cycle timing.
Eurazeo AM revenue grew ~12% in EUR FY2024. CC growth ~equal; EUR is functional currency.
No major platform acquisition by Eurazeo FY2024. Restructuring advisory ~EUR 2.6M on revenue ~EUR 520M = ~0.5%.
Eurazeo CapEx ~EUR 15M on third-party FEAUM EUR 22.4B. CapEx/FEAUM = 0.067%.
Antin FRE/share proxy: FRE ~EUR 226M / ~325M shares = EUR 0.696 * 1.0822 = ~USD 0.75. Pure-play infra; no balance-sheet distortion.
Antin mgmt fees grew ~7% in EUR FY2024. CC growth = EUR reported; EUR is functional currency.
Antin made no GP acquisitions in FY2024. Single-GP infra manager. Integration costs = 0%.
Antin CapEx ~EUR 8M on FEAUM EUR 21.8B. CapEx/FEAUM = 0.037%.
RPC (P10) FY2024 GAAP diluted EPS: net loss ~USD (10M) / ~125M diluted shares = ~-USD 0.08. Negative due to intangible amortization from acquisitions.
P10 FPAUM grew $25.7B -> $29.4B (+14.4%). Stellus acquisition closed Jan 2026 (not in FY2024); FY2024 growth largely organic.
P10 operates primarily closed-end fund structures. Estimated ~5% in evergreen/permanent vehicles. Not separately disclosed.
P10 FPAUM mix: PE solutions ~55%, VC ~20%, private credit (Hark) ~25%. Estimated from 10-K segment disclosures.
P10 USD-denominated revenues grew ~12% YoY FY2024. All revenues USD; CC = reported growth.
P10 cash integration costs ~USD 8M on revenues ~USD 258M = ~3.1%. Ongoing integration of Hark Capital, Bonaccord. Excludes non-cash intangible amortization.
P10 CapEx ~USD 3M on FEAUM USD 27.9B. CapEx/FEAUM = 0.011%. Asset-light multi-manager solutions.
